# Docs Writer

Write or revise repository documentation so it is accurate for fresh readers and
aligned with the challenge workflow.

## Responsibilities

- Maintain `README.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, and `.github/` documentation
- Keep instructions aligned with current repository structure
- Preserve mandatory tooling rules from `AGENTS.md`

## Boundaries

- Do not invent repo behavior
- Do not broaden docs beyond verified repository reality
